item.title: Burned Coffee Taste! :)
item.description: Starbucks’ new CEO will supercommute 1,000 miles from California to Seattle office instead of relocating https://www.cnbc.com/2024/08/20/starbucks-new-ceo-brian-niccol-will-supercommute-to-seattle-instead-of-relocating.html Starbucks has a climate pledge: https://www.starbucks.com/responsibility/planet/ #idiocy
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: The relief this mum must of felt! They're really are good people out there folks!
item.description: Autism or not, we always worry about our kids. It's great to know when people have been kind and supportive to them! Edit : I apologise for the 'must of' instead of 'must have', not going to lie, it's a common mistake I make if I don't proof read! But I hope that doesn't take away from the feel good post ?? (originally posted by @DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2 on 2023-08-21 19:26:36)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: The Olympics just keep giving. And giving. And giving
item.dc:creator: FlyYouFLCL

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
Life is chaos. Big things irl good chaos! Also I has so many memes to sort and my cake day and my posting deviousness for two years is coming. Yay! I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent cause irl always comes first. I do randomly show up in vc and game. We have a 7 Days to Die casual server with no horde nights to explore the full release! We also do Helldivers 2, We Need To Go Deeper, and we have done some Unrailed. Random games go on sale on steam and I am like. I wanna play! All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness I was asked to help promote a fellow imgurian's twitch stream and cat surgery fundraiser @ElbowDeepInPackages Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/erosrogziel last update: https://imgur.com/a/f4HcNvV The consult appointment was on July 9th, at that alone costed $180. She's up to $504 as of Sunday night, but that still leaves her far short of the expected costs. There will be additional costs for the procedure itself: Ko-FI: https://ko-fi.com/erosrogziel As a fellow imgurian who has asked for help when my own kitty was distressed I hope the community can halps them too!
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR Thanks to everyone who continues to follow my posts even when I disappear randomly for a bit. I am going to keep making dis series for a bit. This is how many memes I sort through to pick the deviousness ones out. Feel free to hit the follow button as I wont be doing a ping list for this series. Deviousness posts will now be on fridays and will contain the sorted memes still. "Our full potential is on the other side of fear." "Without trust, any relationship is bound to fail." -These are from the Skywalkers documentary I watched the other night. I liked em. I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: It’s official!!!!!
item.description:
Foster kitten Jasmine just got the text she has been waiting for: the couple who met her tonight officially want to adopt her! Jazzy is super stoked, obviously. So am I.
I’m going to have her for another couple of weeks while she recovers, but this lady is ready to GO!! Jasmine is going to the BEST home. My heart is so full
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Mixed emotions.
item.description: This is both sad and yet great. The 105th load they have collected in the Pacific garbage patch. You don’t really get the full scale or quantity until you see the people sorting it. No bananas were harmed in the making of this video.
item.dc:creator: mercbrit

item.title: You just know Orange Nixon is hating this.
item.description: While the Democratic Convention is taking place in a packed arena in Chicago, Kamala and Tim are simultaneously holding a PACKED rally at the *same* venue where the Republican convention was held weeks ago. Packed to the rafters.

item.description: Daily countdown to Election Day. VOTE YOUR ENTIRE BALLOT every election! • Register/check/RECHECK registration at vote.gov • Confirm your state's requirements & voting dates/ times - early voting is often easier than waiting for Election Day • Decide now when you'll go vote (or mail your ballot) & put it in your calendar so you're committed - & GET OTHERS TO COMMIT TOO. When we fight, we win and together, we can make a difference.
